title: smilax azorica
intro: Smilax azorica, also known as Madeira cat's claw or simply cat's claw, is a type of flowering vine that belongs to the Smilacaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Smilax azorica include reducing inflammation and pain, improving immune function, and supporting cardiovascular health. Smilax azorica can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
